name: Get Job
description_en: A full job-hunt agent: research what a target role actually wants, re-target your resume to it, and prep interviews bullet by bullet.
description_zh: 一个完整的求职 agent:调研目标岗位真实要求、按岗位反向定位简历,并逐条深挖准备面试。
long_en: Three linked stages—role research via web search, resume re-targeting, and round-by-round interview prep—producing research notes, a revised .docx resume, and an interview-prep folder.
long_zh: 三段链路——用网搜调研岗位、按岗位重定位简历、按轮次准备面试——产出岗位调研、改后的 .docx 简历与面试准备文件夹。
sec_note_en: Performs web searches and writes resume documents locally; review generated claims before submitting to employers.
sec_note_zh: 会进行网络搜索并在本地生成简历文档;投递前请核验生成内容的真实性。
